whatsapp.label: Chat with us on WhatsApp
whatsapp.message: Hello Egyptos Centre! I'd like to ask about your services.

hero.title: Where Language Opens
hero.subtitle: Egyptos Centre for Languages and Translation delivers certified translation, professional interpretation, and world-class language education — trusted by students, families, and businesses across Matrouh for nearly a decade.

services.title: Translation & Corporate Services
services.subtitle: Precise, confidential, and delivered on time — for individuals, institutions, and businesses.

cards.title: Document Translation
cards.desc: Certified translation of legal, medical, academic, and personal documents between Arabic and English — accepted by embassies, universities, and government offices.

cards.title: Interpretation
cards.desc: Professional consecutive interpretation for business meetings, medical appointments, and official proceedings, on-site in Matrouh or remotely.

cards.title: Corporate Writing
cards.desc: Polished business correspondence, proposals, reports, and marketing copy that represent your organization with clarity and professionalism.

academy.title: 18-Week English Conversation & Writing Program
academy.subtitle: Go from hesitant to confident. Our structured program builds real speaking fluency and professional writing skills through small groups, practical scenarios, and continuous feedback.
points: Small conversation groups led by experienced instructors
Weekly writing workshops with individual feedback
Free placement test to start at the right level

features.title: 18 Weeks
features.desc: A complete journey from foundations to fluency

features.title: Small Groups
features.desc: Every student speaks in every session

features.title: Certificate
features.desc: Recognized completion certificate from Egyptos Centre

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.subtitle: Visit us in Matrouh, message us on WhatsApp, or request a free translation quote today.

hero.title: The 18-Week English Conversation & Writing Program
hero.subtitle: A structured journey from hesitant English to confident, fluent communication — spoken and written. Taught in small groups at our centre in Matrouh.

cards.title: Speak Every Session
cards.desc: Small conversation groups mean every student talks, every class. No hiding in the back row — fluency comes from practice.

cards.title: Write for Real Life
cards.desc: Weekly workshops on the writing you actually need: emails, applications, essays, and workplace documents, with individual corrections.

cards.title: Learn at Your Level
cards.desc: A free placement test puts you in the right group, so lessons are never too easy or overwhelming.

phases.title: Foundations
phases.desc: Core grammar in context, essential vocabulary, and guided conversations that build the confidence to speak from day one.

phases.title: Fluency Building
phases.desc: Discussion-driven sessions on real-life and workplace topics, paired with weekly writing workshops covering emails and structured paragraphs.

phases.title: Mastery & Application
phases.desc: Presentations, debates, and professional writing projects — essays, reports, and formal correspondence — with individual feedback and a final assessment.

placement.title: Find your level in 15 minutes
placement.subtitle: Take our free online placement test and we'll recommend the right starting group for you — no obligation, results the same day.
placement.note: Contact us and we'll send you the test link on WhatsApp or email.
